title: Spawnable
description: Be truly in control of minecraft spawning!
body:
[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Zeus_Kitchen/MP_ZeusKitchen_promo.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/zeusign)

Spawnable allows configuring spawns for any entity within Minecraft. Just type /spawnable edit, and it allows you to configure mob spawning for each biome! I am going to add more features to this mod later :P

Easy customization for modpack creators in config/spawnable.nbt -- Ignore the ID tag, you don't have to modify it (it's for internal use).

Let me know if you find any bugs, want more customization, or anything else relating to this mod!

Thank you -Zeus
